Examples.Title: Ping the server
Examples.Description: Ping the server to check if it is running
Examples.Setup: This example assumes `using Flowise;` is in scope.

Examples.Title: Send message to flow and get AI response
Examples.Description:
Send a message to your flow and receive an AI-generated response. This is the primary endpoint for interacting with your flows and assistants.
**Authentication**: API key may be required depending on flow settings.
